slides.heading: 5 LinkedIn Growth Tips
slides.description: Simple habits that compound into real reach.

slides.heading: Post when your audience is awake
slides.description: Check your analytics for peak hours and schedule around them, not around when you happen to be free.

slides.heading: Hook in the first line
slides.description: The first sentence decides whether anyone reads the rest. Lead with the payoff, not the setup.

slides.heading: Pick one and start today
slides.description: Follow for more practical growth playbooks.
